title: Targa Offers Some Of The Best Growth In The Midstream Space
text: Targa Resources is an attractive option in the midstream space with strong growth prospects tied to the Permian Basin. The company also has direct commodity price exposure to NGLs and natural gas, and should benefit from any rebound. Targa is aggressively returning capital back to shareholders through dividend hikes and buybacks and looks attractive at current levels given its growth prospects.

title: Targa Resources Corp. to Participate in Investor Conferences
text: HOUSTON, Dec. 01, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE: TRGP) ("Targa" or the "Company") announced today that representatives from the Company will participate in investor meetings at the following investor conferences in New York City, NY:
